perks.summary: compute comprehensive molecular descriptors (MW, LogP, TPSA, HBD/HBA, rings, QED, Lipinski/lead-like flags) for a molecule library; writes a per-molecule descriptor table (read-only)

fingerprint-based similarity screen of a query molecule against a database (morgan/rdkit/maccs/atompair/torsion fingerprints; tanimoto/dice/cosine metric); writes a ranked hit table above a threshold (read-only)
filter a molecule library by SMARTS/SMILES substructure patterns (custom include/exclude or named libraries: functional-groups/rings/pains/privileged); writes a per-molecule match report (read-only)
